tags.documentation:
There are 2 possibilities for Free Cooling Status depending on firmware version.
30109 has been depreciated in lue of 10027. To use the parameter you will need to use the following:
30109@Word or 10027@Boolean.
30109 - 0 = off, 2 = on, 3 = No Support
10027 - 0 = off, 1 = on
tags.name: Free_Cooling_Status

tags.documentation: 1= Normal Ops, 2= Start up, 8= Normal with Warning, 16=Normal with Alarm, 32= Abnormal Operation
tags.expression:
Case({[.]System_Status},
1, "Normal Operation",
2, "Start up",
8, "Normal with Warning",
16, "Normal with Alarm",
32, "Abnormal Operation",
"Unknown"
)
tags.name: System_Operating_Status

tags.documentation: Liebert (0=Internal (Auto),1 = External (Manual); Stulz (0=Dewpoint,1=Hybrid,2=Standard) UMAS (0: Ctrl by BMS fix spd, 1: Ctrl by BMS room temp, 2: Ctrl by return air temp (local))
tags.name: System_Control_Mode_Raw

tags.documentation: 1 = Normal Operation, 2 = StartUp, 8 = Normal with Warning, 16 = Normal with Alarm, 32 = Abnormal
tags.name: System_Status
